Detailed Description

Typedef Documentation

typedef enum mw_venc_inframe_mode mw_venc_inframe_mode_t

#include <mw_venc_common_ex.h>

mw_venc_inframe_mode_t

Defines the data type entered by the encoder.
Related function(s):
mw_venc_create_ex

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum mw_venc_inframe_mode

#include <mw_venc_common_ex.h>

mw_venc_inframe_mode_t

Defines the data type entered by the encoder.
Related function(s):
mw_venc_create_ex

Enumerator
MW_VENC_INFRAME_MODE_UNKNOWN 

Inputs unknown data type.

MW_VENC_INFRAME_MODE_OPENGL_TEXTURE 

Inputs OpenGL texture.

MW_VENC_INFRAME_MODE_COUNT 

Number of input data types.
